section.label: Experience
section.title: Where I've led & built.
section.subtitle: Professional roles where I've delivered real impact — from engineering leadership to operational systems development.

items.title: CTO & Software Engineer
items.description: Led all technical decision-making as founding CTO. Responsible for product architecture, engineering team leadership, infrastructure, and delivery of the core platform.
achievements: Architected and built the core Netpipo platform from inception to production deployment
Established engineering practices, code review processes, and deployment workflows
Designed and implemented payment integrations and third-party API connections
Managed infrastructure using Docker, Nginx, and Linux servers — achieving high availability
Contributed as a hands-on engineer while fulfilling strategic leadership responsibilities

items.title: Software Engineer
items.description: Served as a software engineer for an accounting and training services firm, designing and delivering multiple business-critical systems to streamline operations, automate financial workflows, and support large-scale enrollment processes.
achievements: Designed and developed a comprehensive Enrollment Management System (EMS) enabling administrators to create training programs, process applications, and manage the full enrollment lifecycle from submission to program commencement
Built robust integrations with QuickBooks Online to synchronize customers, invoices, payments, items, and chart of accounts with an external Management Information System (MIS)
Developed payment processing integrations with UrubutoPay to securely handle student transactions and persist payment records for downstream MIS consumption
Engineered RESTful APIs and backend services to support scalable data exchange between internal platforms and third-party systems
Collaborated with operations teams to translate business requirements into reliable software solutions aligned with financial compliance needs

items.title: IT Operations Officer
items.description: Managed and improved the IT infrastructure and digital systems of an accounting services firm, introducing automation and integration solutions that significantly improved efficiency.
achievements: Integrated QuickBooks with internal workflows to reduce manual data entry and reconciliation time
Built custom automation tools for repetitive accounting and reporting processes
Maintained and optimised internal systems and databases for reliability and performance
Provided technical support and system administration across the organisation
